rows.label: qev012404_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you the one Howard was
talking about? So you gathered
the repair materials for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yes, this is it. We can repair the
damaged main rotor with this, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0003
rows.name:
To be honest, I don't really
know how to repair it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0004
rows.name:
Should I connect it to the red wire? Or
should I connect it to the blue wire...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0005
rows.name:
Honestly I think either is fine,
but Howard is so annoying, calling
me irresponsible and all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0006
rows.name:
We had a fight just now and he
kicked me out of the helicopter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0007
rows.name: ...Could you do the repairs?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0008
rows.name:
If I touch it and it crashes, he'll
complain, but he wouldn't say that to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0009
rows.name:
Actually, if we crash he won't be
able to say anything at all. Fufu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0010
rows.name: Go on, fix the main rotor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0011
rows.name:
Should you connect it to the
red wire? Or should you connect
it to the blue wire...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0012
rows.name:
I don't know which one is the correct
answer, but the helicopter should fly
either way, so just do whatever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0013
rows.name: Looks like the repairs are done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0014
rows.name:
Surprisingly, it works even with random
materials... The tail rotor is in better
shape too, so it looks like we can fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0015
rows.name: Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0016
rows.name:
You're a pro at helicopter repairs
and you're stronger than Howard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0017
rows.name:
...It seems Roscoll sent
us the best BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0018
rows.name:
We'll pay your reward once we
arrive at NLA. Let's meet up at
the place where Roscoll was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Now then. Hopefully it won't
turn into a huge fight this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0022
rows.name:
Are you the one Howard was talking
about? But it seems you haven't
gathered the repair materials yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0023
rows.name:
The New-Type Anhydrous Radiator
can apparently be found in the
Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0024
rows.name:
I heard you can find the Spherical Electromagnetic
Motor in the rocky mountains spreading northeast
from the Great Nail in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012404_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Procuring on-site is
no walk in the park.[ST:wait ]
